description: Homeland Security Investigations (HSI) 'thank you' graphic, part of a '#5DaysofThanks' series, in landscape format. The right side is a photograph of a woman in a white lab coat, blue nitrile gloves, and clear safety glasses, holding up and examining a small brown glass vial of dark liquid in a laboratory with an emergency shower fixture and equipment behind her. Over the left and top is a large semi-transparent green 'HSI' wordmark. A solid green band across the lower left contains bold white text: 'Thank you to our HSI workforce for dismantling criminal organizations that threaten the safety of our communities.' Below that, in large dark text on the photo, is the hashtag '#5DaysofThanks'. The circular DHS seal appears at lower right.
notable_text: HSI; Thank you to our HSI workforce for dismantling criminal organizations that threaten the safety of our communities.; #5DaysofThanks
